scenarios.description: load() with default systemProperties=false and empty env list invokes no iterations and returns DotenvImpl
scenarios.precondition: DotenvParser.parse() stubbed to return empty List<DotenvEntry>; real DotenvReader used
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a Dotenv instance whose entries() and entries(null) both return empty unmodifiable Set; no System properties set

scenarios.description: load() with default systemProperties=false and single entry invokes one iteration for systemProperties=false
scenarios.precondition: DotenvParser.parse() stubbed to return List with one DotenvEntry("KEY","VALUE"); real DotenvReader used
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv whose entries() contains exactly one DotenvEntry(KEY,VALUE); System.getProperty("KEY") remains null
pseudocode: stub DotenvParser.parse() to return List.of(new DotenvEntry("KEY","VALUE"));

scenarios.description: load() with default systemProperties=false and multiple entries invokes multiple iterations
scenarios.precondition: DotenvParser.parse() stubbed to return List of three distinct entries; real DotenvReader used
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv with entries() of size 3; no System properties modified

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and empty env list skips forEach and returns DotenvImpl
scenarios.precondition: builder.systemProperties() called; DotenvParser.parse() stubbed to return empty list
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv with entries() empty; no System properties set
pseudocode: TEST TC04 load with systemProperties empty-list

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and one entry skips forEach in code but intended to set system properties
scenarios.precondition: builder.systemProperties() called; DotenvParser.parse() stubbed to return List.of(new DotenvEntry("A","1"))
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv with entries() size 1; System.getProperty("A") == "1" (intended behavior)
pseudocode: TEST TC05 load with systemProperties one-entry
stub DotenvParser.parse() to return List.of(new DotenvEntry("A","1"));

scenarios.description: load() propagates DotenvException when parse() fails
scenarios.precondition: DotenvParser.parse() stubbed to throw new DotenvException("fail")
pseudocode: stub DotenvParser.parse() to throw new DotenvException("fail");
